config.inventory-page-gamepad-edge-scrol: Enabled: on the Inventory page, pressing past the last visible backpack row scrolls the backpack. This can make accessory changes harder with large backpacks. Chests and shops are unchanged.
config.remote-fridge-storage-compat.name: Remote Fridge Storage controller proxy
config.remote-fridge-storage-compat.tool: Enabled: when Remote Fridge Storage is loaded, Full Inventory View adds a controller-navigation proxy over the mod's own fridge toggle. The original Remote Fridge Storage button position and click behavior are not changed.
config.better-game-menu-inventory-page-p: Enabled: when Better Game Menu is loaded, Full Inventory View shifts its Inventory tab upward so expanded backpacks start at the same vertical offset as the vanilla GameMenu.
